EnterpriseSDK
Table of Contents

Interface IMensuration

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.DatasourcesRaster
Assembly
ESRI.Server.DatasourcesRaster.dll

Provides basic mensuration functionality utilizing sensor models that are compliant with the Community Sensor Model (CSM) specification.

[Guid("63AE4F70-BF55-480E-B2E0-49C5528BC4F2")]
[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
public interface IMensuration

Properties

CanErrorPropagate

Indicates if the sensor model associated with the current image segment supports error propagation.

bool CanErrorPropagate { get; }

Property Value

bool

Examples

Sample Snippet

CanMeasure

Indicates if the specified image segment can be used for mensuration.

bool CanMeasure { get; }

Property Value

bool

Examples

Sample Snippet

CanMeasureHeightBaseToTop

Indicates if the sensor model associated with the current image segment supports height mensuration.

bool CanMeasureHeightBaseToTop { get; }

Property Value

bool

Examples

Sample Snippet

CanMeasureHeightBaseToTopShadow

Indicates if the sensor model associated with the current image segment supports shadow mensuration.

bool CanMeasureHeightBaseToTopShadow { get; }

Property Value

bool

Examples

Sample Snippet

CanMeasureHeightTopToTopShadow

Indicates if the sensor model associated with the current image segment supports shadow mensuration.

bool CanMeasureHeightTopToTopShadow { get; }

Property Value

bool

Examples

Sample Snippet

CanMeasureMonoscopic

Indicates if the sensor model associated with the current image segment supports monoscopic mensuration.

bool CanMeasureMonoscopic { get; }

Property Value

bool

Examples

Sample Snippet

CanMeasureMultiImages

Indicates if the sensor model associated with the current image segment supports multi-image mensuration.

bool CanMeasureMultiImages { get; }

Property Value

bool

Examples

Sample Snippet

CanMeasureStereoscopic

Indicates if the sensor model associated with the current image segment supports stereoscopic mensuration.

bool CanMeasureStereoscopic { get; }

Property Value

bool

DEM

The DEM for the raster to be used for mensuration.

IRaster DEM { get; set; }

Property Value

IRaster

Default pointing error covariance matrix.

IDoubleArray DefaultPointingErrCovariance { get; set; }

IDoubleArray

Sample Snippet

DesiredPrecision

The iteration precision of the image-to-ground and ground-to-image calculations.

double DesiredPrecision { get; set; }

Property Value

double

Sample Snippet

Name

The name of this IMensuration object.

string Name { get; }

Property Value

string

Examples

Sample Snippet

Raster

The raster object to be used for mensuration.

IRaster Raster { set; }

Property Value

IRaster

Sample Snippet

SensorModel

The name of the sensor model currently being used by this IMensuration object.

string SensorModel { get; }

Property Value

string

The properties of the current sensor model.

Sample Snippet

The name of the TerrainModel used by this IMensuration object.

string TMName { get; }

string

Indicates if all the required system parameters and resources of this IMensuration have been successfully initialized.

bool Valid { get; }

SignificantFigures(double, double, out string, out string)

Truncates input mensuration and uncertainty values based on acceptable rules for reporting measurement and uncertianty values.

void SignificantFigures(double measurementValue, double uncertainty, out string pMeasurement, out string pUncertainty)

Parameters

measurementValue double
uncertainty double
pMeasurement string
pUncertainty string
